messages.body:
Subject: Quote request – BP102

Hi,

Could you please send us a quote for BP102? We are looking to order 23 MT for March this year.

Thanks.

Subject: Re: Quote request – BP102

Hi,

Thanks for your enquiry. We can supply 23 MT for March. Our mid-day price today is USD 1350/MT CIF Busan. Offer valid for 24h till 1400 SGT on 2026-02-09.

Best regards.

Subject: Re: Quote request – BP102

Thanks for the quote. Any chance you could do USD 1300/MT?

Subject: Re: Quote request – BP102

Let me check with our team and revert.

Subject: Re: Quote request – BP102

We can meet in the middle at USD 1325/MT CIF Busan. Can you confirm?

Subject: Re: Quote request – BP102

We can work with that. Please confirm the trade for 23 MT BP102 at USD 1325/MT CIF Busan for march shipment.

Subject: Re: Quote request – BP102

Confirmed. 23 MT BP102 at USD 1325/MT CIF Busan, march shipment. We will send the contract shortly. Please note vendor name to be used: AG Lipids Pte Ltd.

Best regards.

Subject: Re: Quote request – BP102

Noted on AG Lipids Pte Ltd. Thanks.
